accountType.pageSubtitle: Choose your account type to start your distinguished learning journey

messages.comingSoon: Registration for this account type will be available soon.

student.title: Student
student.description: Explore your knowledge world, solve challenges, and compete with peers in a motivating learning environment.

teacher.title: Teacher
teacher.description: Manage your classes, track student progress, and design interactive learning content with ease.

parent.title: Parent
parent.description: Follow your children's learning journey, view their achievements, and be a partner in their success.

school.title: School
school.description: Manage students, teachers, and classes, and monitor the learning process from one dashboard.
